item.title: Spring is right around the corner — train with confidence
item.description:
Spring is almost here, and that means more runs, more sessions, and more momentum.
We’ve got many excited updates planned, and the goal stays the same: help you get ready for any type of run, then keep you supported as your training builds toward your next goal.
Whether you’re doing easy days, long runs, race prep, or switching things up week to week, RunPrep makes it easy for you to lace up and get running.
GIVE FEEDBACK (tap to answer) 1) Help us plan what’s next by sharing your thoughts 2) Specifically: how useful do you think the Pollen feature will be?
Thanks for helping shape the roadmap.

item.title: v2.6 — Race Pace Predictor + new tools
item.description:
RunPrep v2.6 adds the Race Time Predictor to help you estimate your potential more confidently for your next race. Put in as much or as little information as you want, and see what is your expected finish time for your upcoming races!
More improvements are already in progress too—new tools are coming soon, and we’re excited to keep building with you.

item.title: More updates are coming — here’s where we’ll share them
item.description:
Many new features are on the way, and this is the place where we’ll communicate what’s new to users.
Whenever we roll out new tools, improvements, or helpful updates, you’ll see them here in-app—so you never have to wonder what changed or what to look for next.
